{{CargoRelic
|name=Ouroboros Statue
|class_id=20161
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This unique trinket is Astaroth's reward for her subordinates. The small coiling snake on it is her servant. The ouroboros-like shape allows the magic power to circulate within its body, enabling long-term use of it so that Astaroth can monitor its owner however she likes.
|fame=15
|art=30
|fth=19
|civ=13
|tech=13
|ss1=Against Demon Lords, DMG +1%<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail ATK +8<br>Demon Lords Defeated: 20/20
|ss2=Against Demon Lords, DMG +2%<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail ATK +16<br>Demon Lords Defeated: 20/20
|ss3=Against Demon Lords, DMG +3%<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail ATK +24<br>Demon Lords Defeated: 20/20
|ss4=Against Demon Lords, DMG +3%<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail ATK +24<br>Demon Lords Defeated: 20/20
|ss7=Against Demon Lords, DMG +3%<br>Per Demon Lord defeated, Snail ATK +24<br>Demon Lords Defeated: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
